name: Data Collection from Local System
description: Detects systematic collection of sensitive files from the local system
query:
// Detect sensitive file collection
// Trigger on copying multiple document types to a staging directory
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(copy|cp|xcopy|robocopy).*\.(docx?|xlsx?|pptx?|pdf|kdbx|key|pem|conf|cfg)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 5
within 300 seconds
